reasoning: The visualization fails to answer the specific business question asked: 'Wieviel Umsatz hatte Teckentrup... im Segment JVA?' (How much revenue did Teckentrup have...). The question implies a need for total annual figures or at least an aggregation by year to compare performance over time (2021-2024). Instead, this chart displays every single month individually across all four years on a crowded x-axis with 48 bars. This makes it extremely difficult for a user to quickly grasp the total yearly revenue or identify high-level trends without performing mental summation. While the data points are correct, the granularity is too low for the strategic question posed. A bar chart showing Total Revenue per Year would be far more effective.
suggested_improvement: Aggregate the monthly data into annual totals and display a simple bar chart with one bar per year (2021, 2022, 2023, 2024) labeled with the total revenue value.
